description: A forensic anthropologist needs to determine the facial width (Bizygomatic Breadth) from the CT Cranium DICOM scan already loaded in InVesalius 3. Generate a 3D bone surface and measure the distance between the widest points of the cheekbones (left and right Zygomatic Arches) on the 3D model. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/skull_3d_measure.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
